title: senna birostris var. totorae
intro: Senna birostris var. totorae, also known as Totora senna, is a variety of the senna plant native to South America. It is a shrub-like plant known for its medicinal properties, particularly as a laxative, due to its high concentration of anthraquinone glycosides, which stimulate bowel movements and aid in digestion. The health benefits of Totora senna include relief from constipation, improved gut health, and support for the immune system, although it should be used with caution and under medical supervision. Totora senna can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tablet, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional medicine to enhance its effects.
